query:
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, title, enrichedTitle, company, reviewedCompanyName, email, enrichedEmail, score, tier, titleRelevance, matchedProjectCount 
FROM campaignContacts 
WHERE campaignId = 2 AND (email IS NOT NULL OR enrichedEmail IS NOT NULL) AND email != '' 
ORDER BY score DESC 
LIMIT 5
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT id, firstName, lastName, title, enrichedTitle, company, reviewedCompanyName, email, enrichedEmail, score, tier, titleRelevance, matchedProjectCount 
FROM campaignContacts 
WHERE campaignId = 2 AND (email IS NOT NULL OR enrichedEmail IS NOT NULL) AND email != '' 
ORDER BY score DESC 
LIMIT 5
